Class JavaCardDLStrategy

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.StaticFeatureCollection
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.AbstractFeatureStrategy
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.JavaCardDLStrategy
All Implemented Interfaces:
ComponentStrategy, Strategy<Goal>, Named, Feature
Direct Known Subclasses:
SimplifyTermStrategy, SymbolicExecutionStrategy
public class JavaCardDLStrategy extends AbstractFeatureStrategy implements ComponentStrategy

This strategy is the catch-all for Java related features that are either cross-cutting or one of the features that do not fit well into any other strategy.

Do not create directly, instead use JavaCardDLStrategyFactory.

    • computeCost

      public <GOAL extends ProofGoal<@NonNull GOAL>> RuleAppCost computeCost(@NonNull RuleApp app, @NonNull PosInOccurrence pio, @NonNull GOAL goal, @NonNull MutableState mState)
      Evaluate the cost of a RuleApp.
      Specified by:
      computeCost in interface Feature
      Parameters:
      app - rule application
      pio - corresponding PosInOccurrence
      goal - corresponding goal
      mState - the MutableState to query for information like current value of TermBuffers or ChoicePoints
      Returns:
      the cost of the rule application expressed as a RuleAppCost object. TopRuleAppCost.INSTANCE indicates that the rule shall not be applied at all (it is discarded by the strategy).

    • isApprovedApp

      public final boolean isApprovedApp(RuleApp app, PosInOccurrence pio, Goal goal)
      Re-Evaluate a RuleApp. This method is called immediately before a rule is really applied
      Specified by:
      isApprovedApp in interface Strategy<Goal>
      Parameters:
      app - the rule application
      pio - the position in occurrence
      goal - the goal
      Returns:
      true iff the rule should be applied, false otherwise

    • instantiateApp

      public RuleAppCost instantiateApp(RuleApp app, PosInOccurrence pio, Goal goal, MutableState mState)
      Specified by:
      instantiateApp in interface Strategy<Goal>

    • isStopAtFirstNonCloseableGoal

      public boolean isStopAtFirstNonCloseableGoal()
      Description copied from interface: Strategy
      Checks if the Strategy should stop at the first non-closeable Goal.
      Specified by:
      isStopAtFirstNonCloseableGoal in interface Strategy<Goal>
      Returns:
      true stop, false continue on other Goals.

    • isResponsibleFor

      public boolean isResponsibleFor(BuiltInRule rule)
      Description copied from interface: ComponentStrategy
      Whether this strategy is responsible for the given BuiltInRule. This is necessary as built-in rules have no rule sets.
      Specified by:
      isResponsibleFor in interface ComponentStrategy
